name: mobile
summary:
Smart-Phone
This is a simple open source python script used for exploiting any android smartphones with a stable session by taking advantage of adb (USB debugging mode on).

documentation.readme: Smart-Phone This is a simple open source python script used for exploiting any android smartphones with a stable session by taking advantage of adb (USB debugging mode on).
